title: chrysanthemum tanacetoides
intro: Chrysanthemum tanacetoides, also known as yellow chrysanthemum or Gan Cao, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is a traditional Chinese medicinal herb with a long history of use, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum tanacetoides include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Chrysanthemum tanacetoides can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
